recommended_scope: H600 first; H650 conditional only if H600 cannot cover enough phase diversity

height_summary.recommendation: scout H700 more only if H600/H650 fail

stage11_4a1_facts.a1_recommendation:
# Stage11-4A1 Recommended Next

Stage11-4A2 recommendation: stop direct Hnew height-scaled template rescue; no H600/H650/H700 scout produced a viable 3-nm tuple. Use broader fixed-height geometry reconstruction before any K=6 work.

run_groups.geometry_knobs: J1/J2 role-pair recombination; swap/no-swap; x/y/diag orientation; gap 40-120 nm; J2 length/width local perturbation
run_groups.purpose: repair B240 first because A1 H600 B240 failed ratio, matrix, and phase
run_groups.early_stop_rule: stop this group after any candidate is strict at 451/452/453, else keep best leakage and matrix near-miss

run_groups.geometry_knobs: swap/no-swap; x_pair/diag_pair; gap 60-120 nm; center offset; small J2 length/width perturbation
run_groups.purpose: use H600 B300 high selectivity as phase-only repair seed
run_groups.trigger: run after B240 group or in parallel if budget is available
run_groups.early_stop_rule: stop after strict B300 or if phase error cannot be pulled below loose threshold in first half of variants

run_groups.geometry_knobs: role-pair recombination; orientation family; gap ladder; local width/length perturbation around H600 templates
run_groups.purpose: only cover remaining bins after 240/300 show viable fixed-height behavior
run_groups.trigger: run only if B240 or B300 reaches at least loose at all wavelengths
run_groups.early_stop_rule: stop coverage once four bins have strict or loose candidates over 451/452/453

run_groups.geometry_knobs: same reconstruction knobs as H600, limited to 240/300
run_groups.purpose: test H650 only if H600 lacks enough phase diversity after bottleneck repair attempts
run_groups.trigger: run only if H600 B240 and B300 both fail loose gates
run_groups.early_stop_rule: stop immediately if H650 also fails loose gates for both 240 and 300
